description: MCP server for Google Docs integration with OAuth2 and service account support.
name: com.pulsemcp/google-docs

environmentVariables.description: OAuth2 client ID from Google Cloud Console.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_DOCS_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: OAuth2 client secret from Google Cloud Console.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_DOCS_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Long-lived refresh token obtained from the oauth-setup command.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_DOCS_OAUTH_REFRESH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Service account email address for domain-wide delegation.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_DOCS_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_CLIENT_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Service account private key in PEM format.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_DOCS_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Email address to impersonate in Google Workspace.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_DOCS_IMPERSONATE_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of tool groups to enable (readonly, readwrite, readwrite_external).
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_DOCS_ENABLED_TOOLGROUPS
